definition_cn: 游戏中用到的特定术语及其相关的操作规范。技能表述由数个用语加上常规汉字构成，因此用语对于技能表述而言意义重大，只有使用规范的术语方能传递给玩家准确的牌面信息。
definition_en: The specific terms used in the game and their associated procedural rules. Skill descriptions are composed of several glossary terms combined with ordinary characters, so precise terminology is essential for conveying accurate card information to players.

rules.cn: 部分用语带有其自身的操作规范，其地位等价于游戏通则。
rules.en: Some terms carry their own procedural rules and have the same authority as the general game rules.

rules.cn: 案例中提到“角色”，如无条件的说明，表示不考虑该角色的武将技能或装备技能，视为白板。
rules.en: When an example refers to "a character" without additional qualification, it means the character's General Card skills and equipment skills are not considered — the character is treated as having no skills.

search_text_cn: 用语 导引 术语 规范
search_text_en: glossary guide terms rules

definition_cn: 身份牌代表玩家在游戏里扮演的身份。身份决定玩家的游戏目标。除了主公外，一名角色的身份牌在其因死亡而亮出前对其他角色不可见。
definition_en: An Identity Card represents the identity a player takes in the game. The identity determines the player's win condition. Except for the Lord, a character's Identity Card is not visible to other characters until it is revealed (flipped permanently face-up) upon that character's death.
search_text_cn: 身份牌 主公 忠臣 反贼 内奸 身份 目标
search_text_en: identity card lord loyalist rebel spy identity win condition

definition_cn: 武将牌代表玩家操控的三国武将。武将牌上标识了势力、体力上限、技能、性别等属性。武将牌的技能专指武将牌左下角用白底的技能框圈起来的技能。
definition_en: A General Card represents the Three Kingdoms general a player controls. It displays the character's faction, Max HP, skills, gender, and other attributes. "Skills on a General Card" refers specifically to the skills listed inside the white-background skill box at the bottom-left of the card.

rules.cn: 武将牌的技能专指武将牌左下角用白底的技能框圈起来的技能。
rules.en: "Skills on a General Card" refers specifically to the skills listed inside the white-background skill box at the bottom-left of the card.

examples.cn: 左慈发动【化身②】不能声明邓艾的武将牌的文字里的【急袭】。
examples.en: When Zuo Ci activates [Shapeshifter②], he cannot declare [Sudden Raid] from the text on Deng Ai's General Card (since it appears outside the skill box).

examples.cn: 张飞杀死蔡文姬，蔡文姬触发【断肠】，张飞失去其当前的所有武将技能。然后在张飞死亡后，夏侯氏发动【孝德】依然可以拥有张飞的武将牌的【咆哮】。
examples.en: Zhang Fei kills Cai Wenji. Cai Wenji triggers [Heartbreak] and Zhang Fei loses all his current General Card skills. After Zhang Fei dies, Lady Xiahou activates [Filial Devotion] and can still obtain [Roar] from Zhang Fei's General Card.

search_text_cn: 武将牌 技能 势力 体力上限 性别 属性
search_text_en: general card skill faction max hp gender attributes

definition_cn: 在游戏过程中所有角色共用的牌。游戏牌分为基本牌、锦囊牌和装备牌三个类别。每张游戏牌的左上角均标有花色和点数。
definition_en: Cards shared by all characters during the game. Library Cards are divided into three categories: Basic Cards, Tool Cards, and Equipment Cards. Every Library Card has a suit and rank printed in its upper-left corner.
search_text_cn: 游戏牌 基本牌 锦囊牌 装备牌 花色 点数
search_text_en: library card basic tool equipment suit rank shared

definition_cn: 基本牌上除花色和点数外，仅标识了牌的名称和插图。基本牌是数量占比最多的游戏牌，有最简单而实用的功能。
definition_en: A Basic Card carries only its name and artwork beyond the suit and rank. Basic Cards are the most numerous card type and have the simplest, most versatile functions.
search_text_cn: 基本牌 杀 闪 桃 酒 毒
search_text_en: basic card kill dodge peach wine poison

definition_cn: 装备牌分为武器牌、防具牌、坐骑牌和宝物牌。一名角色的装备区里只能放置一张武器/防具/【-1坐骑】/【+1坐骑】/宝物牌。
definition_en: Equipment Cards are divided into Weapon Cards, Armor Cards, Mount Cards, and Treasure Cards. A character's Equipment Zone may hold at most one card in each slot: one weapon, one armor, one [-1 Mount], one [+1 Mount], and one treasure.

rules.cn: 当角色将武器牌/坐骑牌当其他牌使用，或弃置武器牌/坐骑牌作为发动技能的消耗时，不能同时用到该武器牌/坐骑牌提供的距离、攻击范围或技能。
rules.en: When a character uses a weapon or mount card as a substitute for another card, or discards a weapon or mount card as a skill cost, the distance modification, attack range, or skill provided by that card cannot simultaneously take effect.

examples.cn: 对装备【麒麟弓】的关羽使用【借刀杀人】选择对距离为2以上的角色使用【杀】时，关羽不可以发动【武圣】将其装备区里的【麒麟弓】当【杀】对该角色使用进行响应。
examples.en: When [Proxy Attack] is used on Guan Yu (equipped with [Kirin Bow]) designating a target at distance 2 or more, Guan Yu cannot activate [Saint of War] to use [Kirin Bow] from his Equipment Zone as a [Kill] to respond — [Kirin Bow]'s range would no longer apply since it is being used as a substitute card.

rules.cn: 当角色用到一张装备牌提供的距离、攻击范围或技能时，不能以任何方式操作该装备牌。
rules.en: When a character is benefiting from a distance modification, attack range, or skill provided by an equipment card, that equipment card cannot be operated in any way.

examples.cn: 不可以通过弃置装备区里的【贯石斧】和另一张牌的方式发动【贯石斧】。
examples.en: A character cannot activate [Stonepiercer]'s skill by discarding [Stonepiercer] itself along with another card.

rules.cn: 装备技能的效果与武将技能的同类效果能叠加。
rules.en: The effects of equipment skills and General Card skills of the same type stack.

examples.cn: 太史慈使用【杀】在选择目标时受到【天义】和【方天画戟】的影响，至多可以选择四个目标。
examples.en: When Tai Shi Ci uses [Kill] and selects targets, with both [Heaven's Justice] and [Sky Piercer] applying, he may select up to four targets in total.

rules.cn: 角色使用装备牌的目标默认为该角色自己。
rules.en: The default target when a character uses an Equipment Card is that character themselves.

search_text_cn: 装备牌 武器牌 防具牌 坐骑牌 宝物牌 装备区 攻击范围 距离
search_text_en: equipment card weapon armor mount treasure equipment zone attack range distance

definition_cn: 锦囊牌上带有“锦囊”标识。分为两类：带有沙漏标识的为“延时类锦囊牌”，没有沙漏标识的为“非延时类锦囊牌”。
definition_en: A Tool Card bears the "Tool" label. They are divided into two types: those with an hourglass symbol are "Time-Delayed Tools"; those without are "Non Time-Delay Tools".
search_text_cn: 锦囊牌 延时 非延时 沙漏 工具
search_text_en: tool card time-delayed non-time-delay hourglass

definition_cn: 实体牌上的一切信息，如点数、花色、势力、性别、（【杀】的）属性等。
definition_en: All information printed on a physical card, such as rank, suit, faction, gender, and the attribute of a [Kill].
search_text_cn: 牌面信息 点数 花色 势力 性别 属性
search_text_en: card information rank suit faction gender attribute

definition_cn: 标识于游戏牌的左上角，分为红桃、方块、黑桃、梅花四种。
definition_en: Marked in the upper-left corner of a Library Card. There are four suits: Hearts, Diamonds, Spades, and Clubs.
search_text_cn: 花色 红桃 方块 黑桃 梅花
search_text_en: suit hearts diamonds spades clubs

definition_cn: 游戏牌按颜色分为红色、黑色两种。红桃/方块花色的牌的颜色为红色，黑桃/梅花花色的牌的颜色为黑色。
definition_en: Library Cards are divided into two colors: Red and Black. Hearts and Diamonds cards are Red; Spades and Clubs cards are Black.
search_text_cn: 颜色 红色 黑色 红桃 方块 黑桃 梅花
search_text_en: color red black hearts diamonds spades clubs

definition_cn: 标识于武将牌的左上角，分为魏、蜀、吴、群、西、神六种，主色调分别为蓝、红、绿、银、紫、金。
definition_en: Marked in the upper-left corner of a General Card. Six factions exist: Wei (blue), Shu (red), Wu (green), Qun (silver), Western (purple), and God (gold).

rules.cn: 神/西势力武将加入游戏时须改为魏、蜀、吴、群中的任意一种。
rules.en: When a God- or Western-faction general enters the game, their faction must be changed to one of: Wei, Shu, Wu, or Qun.

examples.cn: 神/西势力武将在游戏开始前须从主公开始按行动顺序依次决定自己属于魏、蜀、吴、群四种势力中的哪种。
examples.en: Before the game begins, starting from the Lord and proceeding in turn order, each God- or Western-faction general must choose which of the four factions (Wei, Shu, Wu, or Qun) they belong to.

search_text_cn: 势力 魏 蜀 吴 群 西 神 蓝 红 绿 银 紫 金
search_text_en: faction wei shu wu qun western god blue red green silver purple gold

definition_cn: 角色于游戏规则和用语操作规范外拥有的能力或能进行的操作。角色同时或先后拥有两个同名的技能，则这两个技能相互独立。
definition_en: An ability or action a character possesses beyond the standard game rules and procedural rules. If a character has two skills with the same name simultaneously or in sequence, those two skills are independent of each other.
search_text_cn: 技能 能力 操作 同名 独立
search_text_en: skill ability operation same name independent

definition_cn: 放置牌的场所。
definition_en: A location where cards are placed.
search_text_cn: 区域 场所 放置
search_text_en: zone location place cards

definition_cn: 分发起始手牌后，将剩余的游戏牌放在一起形成牌堆。牌堆里的牌须扣置（背面朝上）。
definition_en: After dealing starting hands, the remaining Library Cards form the Draw Pile. Cards in the Draw Pile must be placed face-down.

rules.cn: 每当一名角色需要操作牌堆里的牌时：若（牌堆里的牌数+弃牌堆里的牌数）＜X，游戏以平局结束；若0＜牌堆里的牌数＜X且（牌堆里的牌数+弃牌堆里的牌数）≥X，系统将弃牌堆里的所有牌以随机顺序置于牌堆底；若牌堆里的牌数=0且弃牌堆里的牌数≥X，系统将弃牌堆里的所有牌以随机顺序置入牌堆。（X为该角色需要操作的牌数）
rules.en: Whenever a character needs to operate on cards from the Draw Pile: if (Draw Pile count + Discard Pile count) < X, the game ends in a draw; if 0 < Draw Pile count < X and the combined total ≥ X, all Discard Pile cards are shuffled and placed at the bottom of the Draw Pile; if the Draw Pile count = 0 and the Discard Pile count ≥ X, all Discard Pile cards are shuffled into the Draw Pile. (X = the number of cards the character needs to operate on.)

search_text_cn: 牌堆 抽牌 扣置 背面朝上 剩余
search_text_en: draw pile face-down remaining reshuffle discard pile

definition_cn: 角色在游戏中以使用、打出或弃置等方式操作的牌最后都将放在一起形成弃牌堆。弃牌堆里的牌须正面朝上放置。
definition_en: Cards that have been used, played out, or discarded during the game are placed here face-up. Cards in the Discard Pile must be placed face-up.
search_text_cn: 弃牌堆 正面朝上 使用 打出 弃置
search_text_en: discard pile face-up used played discarded

definition_cn: 所有角色的装备区和判定区。
definition_en: Refers collectively to all characters' Equipment Zones and Judgment Zones.
search_text_cn: 场上 装备区 判定区
search_text_en: on the field equipment zone judgment zone

definition_cn: 每名角色的区域包括手牌区、装备区和判定区。一名角色的判定区里不能有两张以上同名的牌。角色判定区里的牌不为任何角色所拥有。
definition_en: Each character's zone includes their Hand Zone, Equipment Zone, and Judgment Zone. A character's Judgment Zone cannot contain two cards with the same name. Cards in a character's Judgment Zone are not owned by any character.

rules.cn: 角色判定区里的方块牌视为【乐不思蜀】；角色判定区里的黑色基本牌/黑色装备牌视为【兵粮寸断】。
rules.en: A Diamonds card in a character's Judgment Zone is treated as [Acedia]. A black Basic Card or black Equipment Card in a character's Judgment Zone is treated as [Starvation].

search_text_cn: 角色的区域 手牌区 装备区 判定区
search_text_en: character zone hand zone equipment zone judgment zone

definition_cn: 大多数情况下处理游戏牌的区域。处理区里的牌须正面朝上放置。处理区里的牌不为任何角色所拥有。
definition_en: The zone used to process Library Cards in most situations. Cards here must be placed face-up. Cards in the Processing Zone are not owned by any character.
search_text_cn: 处理区 正面朝上 不属于
search_text_en: processing zone face-up not owned

definition_cn: 玩家手里的牌（简称“手牌”）放置的区域。手牌区里的牌须扣置。角色的手牌对自己可见。
definition_en: The zone where a player's hand cards are kept. Cards here must be placed face-down. A character can see their own hand cards.

rules.cn: 若A执行弃置自己手牌的操作，则A须从所有手牌中选择；若A执行弃置B的手牌的操作，则A须随机弃置B的手牌。
rules.en: When a character discards their own hand cards, they choose which cards to discard. When a character discards another character's hand cards, the cards are discarded randomly.

search_text_cn: 手牌区 手牌 扣置 背面朝上 可见
search_text_en: hand zone hand cards face-down visible

definition_cn: 角色使用的装备牌放置的区域。此区域里共有五个位置，分别放置武器牌、防具牌、【+1坐骑】、【-1坐骑】和宝物牌。装备区里的牌须正面朝上放置。
definition_en: The zone where a character's equipped cards are placed. It has five slots: weapon, armor, [+1 Mount], [-1 Mount], and treasure. Cards in the Equipment Zone must be placed face-up.
search_text_cn: 装备区 武器 防具 坐骑 宝物 五个位置 正面朝上
search_text_en: equipment zone weapon armor mount treasure five slots face-up

definition_cn: 角色成为延时类锦囊牌的目标后，此牌放置的区域。判定区里的牌须正面朝上放置。一名角色的判定区里不能有两张以上同名的牌。角色判定区里的牌不为任何角色所拥有。
definition_en: The zone where a Time-Delayed Tool Card is placed after targeting a character. Cards here must be placed face-up. A character's Judgment Zone cannot contain two cards with the same name. Cards here are not owned by any character.
search_text_cn: 判定区 延时锦囊 正面朝上 不属于
search_text_en: judgment zone time-delayed tool face-up not owned

definition_cn: 每名角色的牌包括其手牌、装备区里的牌和判定牌。每名角色拥有的牌包括其手牌和装备区里的牌。该角色的判定牌不为任何角色所拥有，其判定区里的牌既不是该角色的牌，也不为任何角色所拥有。
definition_en: A character's cards include their hand cards, equipped cards, and judgment cards. A character's "owned" cards include only their hand cards and equipped cards. Their judgment cards are not owned by any character — cards in the Judgment Zone belong to neither the character nor anyone else.

rules.cn: 在牌面中，“角色拥有的牌”会简写成“角色的牌”。一般情况下，以任何形式操作角色的牌都是指操作角色拥有的牌，即角色的手牌和装备区里的牌。但“将角色的牌视为…”（如【红颜】）中的“角色的牌”包括该角色的判定牌。
rules.en: On card text, "cards owned by a character" is often shortened to "a character's cards". In general usage, operating on a character's cards means operating on the cards they own — their hand cards and equipped cards. However, the phrase "treat a character's cards as …" (e.g. [Blushing Beauty]) includes that character's judgment cards.

examples.cn: 执行【寒冰剑】的效果不可以弃置目标角色判定区里的牌。
examples.en: When resolving [Frost Blade]'s effect, cards in the target's Judgment Zone cannot be discarded.

rules.cn: 除因游戏流程要求的操作外，角色不能操作并非该角色拥有的牌。处理区里的牌不为任何角色所拥有。
rules.en: Except where required by game procedure, a character cannot operate on cards they do not own. Cards in the Processing Zone are not owned by any character.

search_text_cn: 角色的牌 拥有的牌 手牌 装备区 判定牌 判定区
search_text_en: character cards owned cards hand equipped judgment cards judgment zone

definition_cn: 游戏牌的左上角的一个数字或字母，从A到K。A代表1点，J代表11点，Q代表12点，K代表13点。A是最小的点数，K是最大的点数。
definition_en: A number or letter in the upper-left corner of a Library Card, ranging from A to K. A = 1, J = 11, Q = 12, K = 13. A is the minimum rank; K is the maximum.

rules.cn: 一张牌的点数若大于K则视为K，若小于A则视为A。
rules.en: If a card's rank would exceed K, it is treated as K. If it would fall below A, it is treated as A.

examples.cn: 发动【丈八蛇矛】将一张点数为7的牌和一张点数为9的牌当【杀】使用，此【杀】的点数为13。
examples.en: When activating [Serpent Spear] to use a rank-7 card and a rank-9 card as a [Kill], the resulting [Kill]'s rank is 13 (capped at K).

search_text_cn: 点数 A J Q K 数字 字母 最大 最小
search_text_en: rank A J Q K number letter maximum minimum

definition_cn: 武将牌上方的阴阳鱼个数，即体力的最大值。若游戏人数不小于5，主公的体力上限+1。
definition_en: The number of yin-yang symbols on the General Card, representing the maximum possible HP. If the player count is 5 or more, the Lord's Max HP is increased by 1.

rules.cn: 角色减体力上限后，若其体力值超过体力上限，其须将体力调整至等同于体力上限。
rules.en: If a character's current HP Value exceeds their Max HP after the Max HP is reduced, their HP must be adjusted down to match the new Max HP.

search_text_cn: 体力上限 阴阳鱼 最大值 主公 人数
search_text_en: max hp yin-yang maximum lord player count

definition_cn: 游戏开始时，每名角色均拥有等同于体力上限的体力，在游戏过程中此数值有可能发生变化。角色的体力有可能小于0。
definition_en: At the start of the game, each character's HP equals their Max HP. This value may change during play. A character's HP can go below 0.
search_text_cn: 体力 生命值 回复 伤害 扣减
search_text_en: hp health recover damage reduce

definition_cn: 角色的体力牌上未被武将牌挡住的阴阳鱼个数，通常是作为游戏中所调用的一个参数被提到。当角色的体力降到0或更低时，其体力值为0。
definition_en: The number of visible yin-yang symbols on a character's HP tracker, used as a numeric parameter in calculations. When a character's HP drops to 0 or lower, their HP Value is treated as 0.
search_text_cn: 体力值 参数 阴阳鱼 计算 数值
search_text_en: hp value parameter calculation numeric

definition_cn: 角色的手牌上限为其体力值。手牌上限通常只于角色的弃牌阶段提及，角色能保留的手牌数不能超过其手牌上限。手牌上限经过修正后最小值为0。
definition_en: A character's Hand Limit equals their HP Value. The Hand Limit is normally relevant only during the Discard Phase: a character cannot keep more cards in hand than their Hand Limit. The minimum Hand Limit after modification is 0.
search_text_cn: 手牌上限 体力值 弃牌阶段 保留 最小值
search_text_en: hand limit hp value discard phase keep minimum

definition_cn: 此数值由角色的体力上限减去体力值得到。
definition_en: Calculated as: Max HP minus current HP Value.
search_text_cn: 已损失的体力值 体力上限 体力值 差值
search_text_en: hp lost max hp hp value difference

definition_cn: 牌或技能描述中，“造成/受到X点伤害”的X即此伤害的伤害值基数。
definition_en: The X in a card or skill description that reads "deal/receive X damage". This is the starting damage amount before any modifications.
search_text_cn: 伤害值基数 伤害 X 基础
search_text_en: base damage value X starting amount

definition_cn: 两名角色间相对的最短路径（顺时针或逆时针，计算最短箭头数）即为两名角色间的距离值。一名角色死亡则不再参与距离的计算。一名角色与其他角色间，最短距离为1。自己与自己的距离永远是0。
definition_en: The shortest path between two characters (clockwise or counter-clockwise, counting the fewest steps). Dead characters are excluded from distance calculations. The minimum distance between any two different characters is 1. A character's distance to themselves is always 0.

rules.cn: “A与B的距离”和“B与A的距离”会因为受到不同坐骑牌的技能/武将技能的影响而不同。
rules.en: "Distance from A to B" and "distance from B to A" can differ due to mount card skills or general skills.

examples.cn: 当D装备【+1坐骑】时，其他角色与D的距离+1，而D与其他角色的距离不变；当D装备【-1坐骑】时，D与其他角色的距离-1，而其他角色与D的距离不变。

definition_cn: 一名角色的体力值被扣减后，若该角色的体力值为0，则其进入濒死状态，须进行濒死结算。处于濒死状态的角色并不会立即死亡，须进行濒死结算。不可能有两名以上的角色同时处于濒死状态。
definition_en: When a character's HP is reduced to 0, they enter the Verge of Death State and a Verge of Death Resolution must be performed. A character in the Verge of Death State does not immediately die. No more than one character can be in the Verge of Death State at the same time.

rules.cn: 若B在A的濒死结算中进入濒死状态，则插入进行B的濒死结算，在B的濒死结算过程中A视为不处于濒死状态，直到B的濒死结算完毕继续进行A的濒死结算。若在B的濒死结算过程中，A的体力值被扣减，A不进入濒死状态，继续正常进行B的濒死结算。
rules.en: If B enters the Verge of Death State during A's Verge of Death Resolution, B's Verge of Death Resolution is inserted and processed first. During B's resolution, A is not considered to be in the Verge of Death State. Once B's resolution completes, A's resolution continues. If A's HP is reduced during B's resolution, A does not re-enter the Verge of Death State — B's resolution continues normally.

search_text_cn: 濒死状态 体力值 0 濒死结算 挽救
search_text_en: verge of death state hp zero resolution saved

definition_cn: 处于濒死状态的角色在濒死结算中未被挽救，或角色的体力上限减为0，则死亡。当角色的体力上限减为0时，其体力值调整为0，但不会进入濒死状态，不能进行濒死结算，而是直接死亡。
definition_en: A character dies if: (1) they are in the Verge of Death State and are not saved during Verge of Death Resolution, or (2) their Max HP is reduced to 0. When Max HP is reduced to 0, the character's HP Value is adjusted to 0 but they do NOT enter the Verge of Death State — they die directly and cannot be saved.

rules.cn: 体力值大于0的角色死亡，其体力值不会变化。已经死亡的角色的体力不会变化。
rules.en: When a character with HP Value greater than 0 dies, their HP Value does not change. A dead character's HP does not change.

search_text_cn: 死亡 濒死 体力上限 0 直接死亡 不能挽救
search_text_en: death verge of death max hp zero directly cannot be saved

definition_cn: 当目标角色因受到一个来源对其造成的伤害而进行濒死结算且未于此次濒死结算中被挽救，则此来源杀死了目标角色。
definition_en: A source "kills" a target character when the target undergoes Verge of Death Resolution due to damage from that source, and is not saved during that resolution.
search_text_cn: 杀死 来源 濒死结算 未被挽救
search_text_en: kill source verge of death resolution not saved

definition_cn: 角色使用或打出牌、发动技能或处于某些状态时，都是在发生一个事件。事件是若干个相关的结算过程的总和，可能被其他事件响应。
definition_en: Whenever a character uses or plays out a card, activates a skill, or enters certain states, an Event occurs. An Event is the sum of several related resolution processes and can be responded to by other Events.
search_text_cn: 事件 使用 打出 发动 状态 响应
search_text_en: event use play activate state response

definition_cn: 一个事件对另一个事件加以影响的形式。
definition_en: The form by which one Event influences another Event.
search_text_cn: 响应 影响 事件
search_text_en: response influence event

definition_cn: 处理一个事件的过程。
definition_en: The process of handling/resolving an Event.
search_text_cn: 结算 处理 事件 过程
search_text_en: resolution process event handle

definition_cn: 时机是一个瞬间，一个事件发生时会产生若干个时机。所有结算都是事件在合理的时机插入发生后所进行的处理过程，因此凡是插入发生的事件都会导致正在进行的结算暂停，先进行插入的事件的结算。
definition_en: A Timing is an instant. When an Event occurs, it generates several Timings. All Resolutions are the processing of Events inserted at valid Timings. Any inserted Event causes the current ongoing Resolution to pause while the inserted Event is fully resolved first.
search_text_cn: 时机 瞬间 插入 暂停 结算
search_text_en: timing instant insert pause resolution

definition_cn: 牌/武将技能的文字描述里能产生的具体影响。
definition_en: The specific concrete impact described in a card's or general skill's text.
search_text_cn: 效果 影响 描述 技能 牌
search_text_en: effect impact description skill card

definition_cn: 一般用于两种情况：1.一张牌对使用目标无效，即终止对该目标的结算；2.一个技能无效，即非状态类技能不能发动，状态类技能不能产生影响。
definition_en: Used in two contexts: (1) A card is Nullified against its target: the resolution of that card for that specific target is terminated. (2) A skill is Nullified: a non-state skill cannot be activated; a state skill cannot produce its effects.

rules.cn: 一张牌对角色无效，该角色依然可以被选择为此牌的使用目标。例如，可以对装备【仁王盾】的角色使用黑色的【杀】，但是该角色不能使用【闪】进行响应。虽然此【杀】无效，但是依然会计入出牌阶段使用【杀】的次数限制。
rules.en: When a card is Nullified against a character, that character can still be selected as the card's target. For example, you can use a black [Kill] on a character equipped with [Vajra Shield], but they cannot play [Dodge] to respond. Even though the [Kill] is Nullified, it still counts toward the Action Phase [Kill] frequency limit.

search_text_cn: 无效 终止 结算 技能无效 不能发动
search_text_en: nullified terminate resolution skill cannot activate

definition_cn: A无视与B的距离，即A检测B是否为合法目标时不需要检测距离；A无视B的防具，即在A的相关结算过程中，B的防具技能无效。但在这些过程中插入的除A外的角色的结算中，B的防具技能有效。角色无视的防具依然是存在的。
definition_en: A ignores distance to B: distance is not checked when A determines whether B is a valid target. A ignores B's armor: during A's resolution against B (including A's skill resolution and damage with source A), B's armor skill is Nullified. However, within that same process, if another character (not A) resolves against B, B's armor is valid again. The armor itself still physically exists even when ignored.
search_text_cn: 无视 距离 防具 无效 忽略
search_text_en: ignore distance armor nullified exist

definition_cn: 在一张牌对一个目标的结算过程中抵消此牌，即此牌对该目标不生效。
definition_en: To negate a card mid-resolution against one target, causing the card to not take effect for that target.
search_text_cn: 抵消 不生效 结算 目标
search_text_en: negate not take effect resolution target

definition_cn: 在一张牌的使用流程中取消一名目标角色，即令其不再是此牌的目标。若将其取消后，此牌仍有其他目标，则继续对其他目标进行结算；若此牌仅有的目标被取消，则终止此牌的使用流程。
definition_en: To remove a character from a card's target list during the Use Process. If other targets remain, resolution continues for them. If the only target is removed, the Use Process is terminated entirely.

rules.cn: 抵消（Negate）与取消（Remove target）不同：抵消是指牌已经开始对目标进行结算但不生效；取消是指在使用流程中该角色不再是目标，相当于从未被选为目标。
rules.en: Negate and Remove Target are distinct: Negate means the card's resolution has begun for the target but does not take effect. Remove Target means the character is no longer a target during the Use Process — as if they were never selected.

search_text_cn: 取消 目标 不再是 使用流程 终止
search_text_en: remove target no longer use process terminate

definition_cn: 改变一张牌所在的区域。
definition_en: To change the zone a card is located in.
search_text_cn: 移动 区域 改变
search_text_en: move zone change

definition_cn: 角色令一张牌/一个技能产生效果。角色一次只能使用一张牌。
definition_en: A character causes a card or skill to produce its effect. A character can only use one card at a time.
search_text_cn: 使用 效果 一张 产生
search_text_en: use effect one card produce

definition_cn: 声明一张牌，然后将之置入处理区，最后将之置入弃牌堆。
definition_en: Declare a card, place it into the Processing Zone, then place it into the Discard Pile.

rules.cn: 使用（Use）与打出（Play out）不同：使用触发完整的使用结算流程；打出仅包括声明、置入处理区、置入弃牌堆，不触发使用结算。
rules.en: Use and Play out are distinct: Use triggers the full Use Resolution with all its steps. Play out only involves declaring, placing into the Processing Zone, and placing into the Discard Pile — it does not trigger a Use Resolution.

search_text_cn: 打出 声明 处理区 弃牌堆 使用
search_text_en: play out declare processing zone discard pile use

definition_cn: 角色在出牌阶段的空闲时间点可以重铸一张带有“重铸”标识的牌，即声明此牌并将之置入处理区，然后将之置入弃牌堆，最后摸一张牌。
definition_en: During the Action Phase at an idle timing, a character may Reforge a card bearing the "Reforge" label: declare it, place it into the Processing Zone, then into the Discard Pile, then draw 1 card.
search_text_cn: 重铸 出牌阶段 标识 摸一张牌
search_text_en: reforge action phase label draw one card

definition_cn: 将牌移动到目标区域。将一张装备牌置入装备区须根据此装备牌的类别置于装备区里的相应空位。“置入弃牌堆”有两个含义：1.角色将牌移动到弃牌堆的操作（表示效果或消耗）；2.执行某操作的结果是将牌移动到弃牌堆（表示条件或时机）。
definition_en: Move a card to the target zone. When placing an Equipment Card into the Equipment Zone, it must go into the appropriate slot for its category. "Place into the Discard Pile" has two meanings: (1) the action of moving a card to the Discard Pile (expressing an effect or cost); (2) the result of an operation being that the card moves to the Discard Pile (expressing a condition or timing).
search_text_cn: 置于 置入 移动 装备区 弃牌堆 空位
search_text_en: place into move equipment zone discard pile slot

definition_cn: 将牌移动到目标区域且背面朝上放置。
definition_en: Move a card to the target zone with the card placed face-down.
search_text_cn: 扣置 背面朝上 移动
search_text_en: place face-down move

definition_cn: 移出游戏的牌不为任何角色所拥有。移出游戏的牌须正面朝上放置。（扣）置于武将牌上/旁的牌都是移出游戏的牌。
definition_en: Cards removed from the game are not owned by any character and must be placed face-up. Cards placed (face-down or face-up) on or beside a General Card are considered removed from the game.
search_text_cn: 移出游戏 不属于 武将牌 正面朝上
search_text_en: removed from game not owned general card face-up

definition_cn: 将一名角色区域里的牌置入处理区，然后将之置入弃牌堆。A令B弃置牌，由B自己选择被弃置的牌；A弃置B的牌，由A选择被弃置的牌。角色执行一次弃置X张牌的技能效果时，若该角色拥有的牌数小于X，则全部弃置。
definition_en: Take a card from a character's zone, place it into the Processing Zone, then into the Discard Pile. When A instructs B to discard: B chooses which cards to discard. When A discards B's cards: A chooses which cards to discard. If a skill requires discarding X cards but the character owns fewer than X, all owned cards are discarded.
search_text_cn: 弃置 选择 处理区 弃牌堆 A令B
search_text_en: discard choose processing zone discard pile instructs

definition_cn: 操作的牌的牌面信息中的牌名与A牌相同。若将一张B牌当A牌操作，B牌的牌面信息并未改变；操作的牌除牌名外的牌面信息与B牌相同。若A牌的牌名为【杀】，默认是指普通【杀】；若A牌的牌名为【无懈可击】，默认是指普通【无懈可击】。
definition_en: The card name becomes A's name, but all other card face information (suit, rank, color) remains that of the original B card. When the target card name is [Kill], it defaults to a plain [Kill]. When the target is [Nullification], it defaults to plain [Nullification].

rules.cn: 将多张牌当A牌使用/打出，若这些牌的颜色均相同，使用/打出的虚拟牌的颜色为此颜色但没有花色，否则既没有颜色也没有花色。将多张牌当一张牌使用/打出，此虚拟牌的点数为这些牌的点数相加之和。
rules.en: When treating multiple cards as one card: if all source cards share the same color, the virtual card has that color but no suit; otherwise it has neither color nor suit. The virtual card's rank equals the sum of all source cards' ranks (capped at K).

search_text_cn: 当A牌 牌名 花色 点数 普通杀 转化
search_text_en: treat as card name suit rank normal kill conversion

definition_cn: 看作执行某操作和拥有某状态。角色视为使用/打出的牌不为任何角色所拥有。若角色执行某操作视为使用牌，即使用虚拟牌，此虚拟牌没有颜色、花色和点数。特别地：若一名角色视为使用【杀】，则其使用的此虚拟【杀】是一张没有颜色、花色和点数的普通【杀】且其使用此虚拟【杀】无距离限制。
definition_en: Regarded as performing an action or holding a state. A card "treated as used/played" belongs to no character. When a character is "treated as using a card," they use a virtual card with no color, no suit, and no rank. Specifically: a virtual [Kill] produced this way is a plain [Kill] with no distance restriction.

rules.cn: 角色拥有的技能既能被使用，也能失去；角色视为拥有的技能只能被使用，无法失去。
rules.en: Skills a character actually owns can be both activated and lost. Skills a character is "treated as having" can only be activated — they cannot be lost.

search_text_cn: 视为 虚拟牌 无距离 普通杀 状态
search_text_en: treated as virtual card no distance plain kill state

definition_cn: 将不是A拥有的牌移动到A的手牌。
definition_en: Move cards not owned by A into A's hand.

search_text_en: give move hand

definition_cn: 两名有手牌的角色各以一张手牌进行点数大小的比较，然后根据结果执行相应效果的操作。
definition_en: Two characters each reveal one hand card; the ranks are compared, and effects are applied based on the result.
search_text_cn: 拼点 比较 点数 手牌 结果
search_text_en: point duel compare rank hand card result

definition_cn: 获得牌堆顶的X张牌。
definition_en: Take the top X cards from the Draw Pile and add them to your hand.
search_text_cn: 摸牌 摸X张 牌堆顶
search_text_en: draw cards top draw pile

definition_cn: 若该角色的…牌数小于X，则摸（X－该角色的…牌数）张牌；若该角色的…牌数不小于X，则不执行此操作。
definition_en: If the character has fewer than X of the specified cards, they draw (X minus their current count) cards. If they already have X or more, this operation is not performed.
search_text_cn: 补至 X张 摸牌 不执行
search_text_en: replenish X cards draw not performed

definition_cn: 角色用/打出A牌代替B牌即将A牌置入B牌所在区域同时将B牌置入弃牌堆。
definition_en: Use/play A card to substitute for B card: A goes into B's zone; B goes into the Discard Pile.

search_text_en: substitute replace discard pile place into

definition_cn: 角色用/打出A牌替换B牌即将A牌置入B牌所在区域同时获得B牌。
definition_en: Use/play A card to replace B card: A goes into B's zone; B goes into your hand (you keep it).

rules.cn: 代替（Substitute）与替换（Exchange）不同：代替时旧牌进弃牌堆；替换时旧牌归获得者的手牌。
rules.en: Substitute and Exchange are distinct: when Substituting, the original card goes to the Discard Pile; when Exchanging, the original card goes to the new owner's hand.

search_text_cn: 替换 代替 获得 置入 手牌
search_text_en: exchange swap substitute gain hand

definition_cn: 你观看相应的牌时，不能让其他玩家看见这些牌且这些牌并没有移动。观看一名角色的手牌默认观看其所有手牌。
definition_en: Look at the cards privately — no other player may see them and the cards do not change location. Looking at a character's hand cards defaults to viewing all of them.
search_text_cn: 观看 私下 不移动 手牌
search_text_en: look at privately not move hand cards

definition_cn: 将背面朝上的牌翻转至正面朝上的动作，然后须翻转至背面朝上。展示角色的手牌时，此牌依然为该角色的手牌，并未失去。
definition_en: Flip a face-down card face-up (so everyone sees it), then flip it back face-down. The card is not lost — it remains in the character's hand.

rules.cn: 在某牌或技能的使用结算中，一名角色的一张手牌被展示，若后续效果中须对此牌进行操作，则不能将此牌翻转至背面朝上。
rules.en: In a Use Resolution, if a character's hand card is revealed and a subsequent effect requires operating on that card, the card cannot be flipped face-down until the operation is complete.

search_text_cn: 展示 正面朝上 背面朝上 翻转 手牌
search_text_en: reveal temporarily face-up face-down flip hand card

definition_cn: 将背面朝上的牌翻转至正面朝上。从牌堆顶亮出的牌须置入处理区。
definition_en: Flip a face-down card face-up permanently. A card flipped from the top of the Draw Pile must be placed into the Processing Zone.

rules.cn: 展示（Reveal temporarily）与亮出（Flip/Reveal permanently）不同：展示后须翻回背面朝上；亮出则永久正面朝上，从牌堆顶亮出的须置入处理区。
rules.en: "Reveal temporarily" (展示) and "Flip permanently" (亮出) are distinct: after 展示 the card is flipped face-down again; after 亮出 the card stays face-up, and if flipped from the Draw Pile, it goes to the Processing Zone.

search_text_cn: 亮出 正面朝上 处理区 牌堆顶 永久
search_text_en: flip permanently face-up processing zone draw pile

definition_cn: 交换的双方先同时将自己的所有手牌/装备区里的牌移动到处理区，然后同时将原本为对方所拥有的牌从处理区移动到自己的手牌/装备区里。交换手牌/身份牌时须背面朝上交换。交换的其中一方可以没有指定交换的牌（此情况依然视为执行了交换的效果）。
definition_en: Both parties simultaneously move their cards (hand/equipment) to the Processing Zone, then simultaneously receive the other party's cards into their own hand/equipment zone. Hand cards and Identity Cards are exchanged face-down. One party may have no cards to exchange — the exchange is still considered executed.
search_text_cn: 交换 同时 处理区 手牌 装备区 身份牌
search_text_en: exchange simultaneously processing zone hand equipment identity

definition_cn: 角色将一张牌移动到其手牌区的操作（表示效果/原因），或一张牌移动到角色的手牌区这一结果（表示条件/时机）。当角色执行获得一名其他角色区域里的一张牌的效果时，若此区域不可见（手牌），则随机获得；若此区域可见（装备区或判定区），则任意获得。
definition_en: Either the action of a character moving a card into their Hand Zone (expressing an effect or cause), or the result of a card moving into a character's Hand Zone (expressing a condition or timing). When gaining a card from another character's zone: if the zone is not visible (hand), one card is gained randomly; if visible (equipment/judgment), any card may be chosen.
search_text_cn: 获得 手牌区 随机 任意 可见

term_cn: 失去牌/手牌/装备区里的牌
term_en: Lose Cards / Lose Hand Cards / Lose Equipped Cards
definition_cn: 一名角色拥有的牌移动到除该角色的手牌区和装备区外的区域，即该角色失去此牌；一名角色的手牌移动，即该角色失去此手牌；一名角色装备区里的牌移动，即该角色失去装备区里的此牌。
definition_en: Lose a card (失去牌): A card the character owns moves out of both their Hand Zone and Equipment Zone. Lose a hand card (失去手牌): Any movement of a hand card. Lose an equipped card (失去装备区里的牌): Any movement of a card from the Equipment Zone.

rules.cn: “失去（过）…牌”中的“…”是指此牌在失去前的牌面信息。
rules.en: In "lost [type] cards," the type refers to the card's face information at the time it was lost, not afterward.

search_text_cn: 失去牌 失去手牌 失去装备 移动 区域

definition_cn: 判断技能或效果起到何种作用的动作，执行的方法是亮出牌堆顶的一张牌（称为“判定牌”），等待生效。生效后的判定牌的花色、点数、名称等信息即为此次判定的结果。当判定牌生效后须将之置入弃牌堆。你进行判定亮出的牌堆顶的一张牌称为“你的判定牌”，但此牌并不是你拥有的牌。
definition_en: An action to determine how a skill or effect applies: flip the top card of the Draw Pile (the "Judgment Card") and wait for it to take effect. Its suit, rank, and name determine the Judgment result. Once the Judgment Card takes effect, it is placed into the Discard Pile. The card you flip is "your Judgment Card" but it is not a card you own.
search_text_cn: 判定 判定牌 亮出 牌堆顶 结果 生效
search_text_en: judgment judgment card flip draw pile result take effect

definition_cn: 若A没有这样的牌，视为A未执行此操作。
definition_en: If A has no such cards, this operation is treated as not having been executed.
search_text_cn: 所有牌 没有 视为 未执行

definition_cn: 武将牌横放的角色即处于“连环状态”，处于连环状态的角色重置即解除连环状态。一名处于连环状态的角色受到并非连环伤害的属性伤害，当此伤害结算结束时，若其存活，其须重置；此伤害结算结束后，若全场还有其他处于连环状态的角色，都会触发连环，须从当前回合角色开始按逆时针方向，依次对所有角色进行：检测角色是否处于连环状态，若处于则受到与此属性伤害同来源、同渠道、同属性、同伤害值的伤害。
definition_en: A character whose General Card is in horizontal position is in the "Chain State." Resetting a chained character removes the Chain State. When a Chained character takes elemental damage that is NOT Chain Damage: at the end of that damage resolution, if they survive, they must Reset. After that resolution, if any other Chained characters remain, chain propagation triggers — starting from the current turn's character, going counter-clockwise, each character is checked: if Chained, they receive damage with the same source, channel, attribute, and damage value.

rules.cn: 受到属性伤害的角色在此伤害结算结束时是否重置是根据其在扣减体力前是否处于连环状态来判断的。属性伤害结算结束后是否触发连环的其中一个判断条件为：受到此属性伤害的角色在扣减体力前是否处于连环状态。
rules.en: Whether a character Resets at the end of elemental damage resolution is determined by whether they were in the Chain State before their HP was reduced. One condition for chain propagation triggering is also whether the character was Chained before their HP was reduced.
